title: Quarter-note foundations
description: Find a steady pulse and learn to read the spaces as confidently as the notes.

title: Around the kit
description: Read the same quarter-note language as it moves between hi-hat, snare and kick.

title: Eighth-note steps
description: Split each beat neatly in two, then read short eighth-note phrases and rests.

title: Quarters and eighth-note pairs
description: Switch confidently between one note per beat and two equal notes per beat.

title: Layered eighths
description: Keep the eighth-note pulse steady while kick and snare rhythms sit underneath it.

title: Eighth-note rests
description: Keep the pulse steady while notes and spaces move between the two halves of each beat.

title: Quarter rests with eighth notes
description: Keep counting through full-beat silences while eighth-note phrases continue around them.

title: Eighth-note rests around the kit
description: Read the gaps across the kit, then let the hands and feet fill each other's spaces.

title: Quarter and eighth rests around the kit
description: Read full-beat and half-beat silences as the hands and feet move around one another.

title: Sixteenth-note foundations
description: Divide each beat into four and keep the strokes even through familiar full-beat gaps.

title: Eighths and sixteenths
description: Switch cleanly between two and four notes per beat without adding rests or quarter notes yet.

title: Quarters, eighths and sixteenths
description: Combine one, two and four notes per beat before bringing silence back into the phrase.

title: Mixed values with quarter rests
description: Combine all three sounding note values with full-beat quarter rests.

title: Mixed values with eighth rests
description: Add half-beat rests to the mixed-value vocabulary while keeping every silence inside its beat.

title: Mixed values with sixteenth rests
description: Complete the binary-rest vocabulary with single sixteenth-note gaps in mixed phrases.

title: Mixed binary rhythms around the kit
description: Apply quarter, eighth and sixteenth-note rhythms and rests across the hands and feet.

title: Triplets and mixed rhythms
description: Feel three equal parts in a beat, then switch confidently between triplet and straight subdivisions.
